deviations.what: The two toolbar buttons reproduce the original controller behaviour server-side: 'Toggle Collapse/Expand' flips NavigationList.expanded (bound to a boolean model field), 'Show/Hide SubItem 3' flips subItemThree.visible. The original used byId().setExpanded/setVisible; here the properties are two-way bound and toggled on a backend round-trip. The 'expanded' attribute on NavigationList and the 'visible' attribute on subItemThree are added to carry these bindings (the original set them imperatively).
